style='text-align:left;padding:10px'><div style='font-size:11px'>received_message_id = <b style='color:#188038'>47</b></div><div style='font-size:10px;color:#666;margin-top:4px'>A has processed all of B's messages through ID 47.</div><div style='font-size:10px;color:#666;margin-top:2px'>This value is reported to B in the next sync — becoming B's acked_message_id for its outbound queue.</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="1050" x="30" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resp_label" parent="1" value="<span style='font-size:10px;color:#666'>← oldest unresponded first</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="430" y="548" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;" value="<b style='color:#7627bb'>Next response from B must match:</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="99" y="595" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc_rb4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#7627bb;strokeWidth=2;" value="<b style='color:#7627bb;font-size:12px'>Rb4</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="80" x="50" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="match_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#7627bb;strokeWidth=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="90" y="618" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="580" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="then_text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="<span style='font-size:10px;color:#666'>→ then Rb6 must match Ma6 → then Rb8 must match Ma8 → …</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="450" x="150" y="632" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="violation" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="<b style='font-size:10px;color:#d93025'>If order is violated → halt Connection, wait for peer to recover.</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="450" x="50" y="658" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_ma" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#1a73e8;" value="" retained (awaiting response)</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="432" y="698" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_del" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="16" x="670" y="700" as="geometry" /> style='font-size:10px'>Incoming response (from B)</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="802" y="698" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
